name: Zucchini Chutney
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the zucchini into thin slices and fry until lightly browned.
2. Add the fried onion pieces and green chilies to the pan, stirring occasionally.
3. Sprinkle turmeric powder and salt over the mixture, then cook on low heat for 5 to 10 minutes, stirring frequently.
4. Boil tamarind paste in water until it becomes a pulp, then add this mixture to the pan with zucchini and onions.
5. Blend all ingredients together into a smooth consistency using a blender or food processor.
6. Seasoning: Toast mustard seeds and urad dal (black gram) separately, then mix them with the chutney before serving.
